detailed_description: Leslie proposes a high-stakes bet where players must gift 10 channel subscriptions.
Squeex immediately flips his golf cart upside down while exploring the lobby, foreshadowing his mechanical struggles.
Squeex fails to understand how to change clubs and angles, repeatedly launching his ball into the sky and water.
Squeex gets targeted and blasted by an in-game dueling pistol, causing dramatic shouting.
Squeex figures out he can hold right-click to project his shot trajectory, marking his mechanical turning point.
Squeex successfully freezes Leslie and Bronny in ice blocks to gain a lead.

Squeex (playing as "Air Coots") successfully navigates the golf cart and finishes 2nd on Hole 4 (+80 points). Meanwhile, Valkyrae struggles heavily, hitting her ball too far and finishing last (+50 points). Squeex is thrilled to find himself in 2nd place overall, trailing only "happily married" (Ludwig).

Right at the tee-off on Hole 5 ("Atoll"), Squeex attempts to use a rocket launcher to blast Valkyrae. Instead, he catches himself in the blast radius, blowing his own character up and leaving himself dazed. The room erupts in laughter as Squeex facepalms.

As Hole 6 starts, Squeex declares that "no one tricks me anymore." Immediately after, he is frozen in ice by Bronny's item, incurring a penalty stroke. To make matters worse, another player runs over his frozen body with a golf cart, causing him to lose his mind in frustration.

On Hole 7 ("Roundabout"), Squeex is immediately targeted off the tee. Bronny uses a weapon to shoot Squeex's ball directly out of bounds before Squeex can even complete his first normal swing. Squeex yells in disbelief at the instant sabotage.

At the start of Hole 8 ("Overlook"), Leslie and Valkyrae explicitly agree to form an alliance to target Squeex. True to their word, Squeex is immediately blasted off the tee, leading him to try and deploy a landmine defensively, though he struggles with the mechanics of burying it.
Squeex makes a brilliant, high-power shot into the cup to finish 1st on Hole 9. He loudly celebrates his triumph, shouting "What a shot! What a shot!" while Valkyrae is left completely tilted.

Valkyrae, highly frustrated by Squeex's success, rants to the lobby that Squeex is the "common enemy." She comically compares him to Medusa and a "siren," claiming that looking at him makes everyone go "goo-goo-ga-ga." Squeex leans into the joke, telling her she is sexy like a siren.
